customAttributes.description:
Return to the Mystical Archive

Choose one —
• Abrade deals 3 damage to target creature.
• Destroy target artifact.

When purchasing this unique product, please keep in mind that this card only appears in the Secret Lair Drop: Return to the Mystical Archive and will ship out to you after the seller receives the product directly from Wizards of the Coast.The estimated time frame for sellers to receive stock is not fixed, so it could be anywhere between 1 - 10 weeks for delivery.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 6/20/2026 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
customAttributes.flavorText:
“We learn so much from the relics we find. What might we have learned from the relics we lost?”
—Kirol
